title: Import creates blank lines on Board

posts.author: johague (Jo Hague)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I have created a Board, exported the content, updated the content and imported using the “New Item” Import Item feature.

It has worked well but it has created blank lines between the items and I don’t understand why? Can you please assist.

image1174×477 29 KB

posts.author: johague (Jo Hague)
posts.cookedHtml:
Every time I do the import it adds an extra blank row.

image1713×1105 122 KB

posts.author: samantha.david (Samantha David)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @johague - Are you still experiencing this issue? Some troubleshooting steps here could be refreshing your browser, toggling between boards, or clearing your cache and logging back in. Let us know if this issue has not been resolved yet.
